🌱 Add podman-container-tools: docker-compose up --force-recreate fails with 'Network [..] mission (#1097)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "podman-container-tools-15580-docker-compose-up-force-recreate-fails-with-network",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "podman-container-tools: docker-compose up --force-recreate fails with 'Network [..] needs to be recreated - option \"isolate\" has changed'",
+    "description": "docker-compose up --force-recreate fails with 'Network [..] needs to be recreated - option \"isolate\" has changed'. This issue affects 13+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify podman-container-tools troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your podman-container-tools installation:\n```bash\npodman --version\npodman info --format json | jq .version\n```\nLook for error: `Network \"recreatebug_default\" needs to be recreated - option \"isolate\" has changed`"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review podman-container-tools configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant podman-container-tools configuration:\n**Description**\n\nSince updating podman to 4.2.0 I'm unable to use `docker-compose up -d --force-recreate` when the containers are already running\n\n1.  Have minimal docker-compose.yml e.g."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for docker-compose up --force-recreate fails with 'Network [..]…",
+        "description": "The workaround here is using this file and obeying the comments:\n\n```yaml\n# We assume this exists in /some/path/example/docker-compose.yaml\nversion: \"3.8\"\nservices:\n  redis:\n    image: \"redis:alpine\"\n    ports:\n      - \"127.0.0.1:6379:6379\"\n\nnetworks:\n  default:\n    # Comment lines below if using\n```yaml\nversion: \"3.8\"\nservices:\n  redis:\n    image: \"redis:alpine\"\n    ports:\n      - \"127.0.0.1:6379:6379\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade podman-container-tools to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade podman-container-tools:\n```bash\n# Check current version\npodman --version\n# Follow the project's upgrade guide at https://github.com/containers/podman\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm docker-compose up --force-recreate fails with… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest podman-container-tools to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that `Network \"recreatebug_default\" needs to be recreated - option \"isolate\" has changed` no longer appears."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The workaround here is using this file and obeying the comments:\n\n```yaml\n# We assume this exists in /some/path/example/docker-compose.yaml\nversion: \"3.8\"\nservices:\n  redis:\n    image: \"redis:alpine\"\n    ports:\n      - \"127.0.0.1:6379:6379\"\n\nnetworks:\n  default:\n    # Comment lines below if using for the 1st time\n    external: true\n    name: example_default\n```\n\nThis way, docker-compose won't try",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "version: \"3.8\"\nservices:\n  redis:\n    image: \"redis:alpine\"\n    ports:\n      - \"127.0.0.1:6379:6379\"",
+        "ERROR: Network \"recreatebug_default\" needs to be recreated - option \"isolate\" has changed",
+        "\"Options\": {\n        \"isolate\": \"true\"\n    },"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "podman-container-tools",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "podman-container-tools"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],

+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],

+      "issue": "https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/15580",

+    },

+  },

+      "podman"
+    ],

+  },
